---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new workflow, template, example, or schema improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the use case?

What were you trying to do when you noticed this was missing?

## Proposed solution

What would you like the template to ship with? Be concrete — point to which file, which section, what content.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about (manual workaround, different template, different tool).

## Scope check

- [ ] This benefits anyone using the template, not just my specific projects
- [ ] No copyrighted content involved
- [ ] No personal data tied to a specific user / venture / client

(See `CONTRIBUTING.md` → "What's Out of Scope")
